news.title: Ørsted Advances Flagship Offshore Wind Projects With Earnings And Risk In Focus
news.summary: Ørsted (CPSE:ORSTED) has started installing foundations at the Baltica 2 offshore wind project in Poland. The company has also commissioned the first monopile foundation at Hornsea 3 in the UK, which is set to be the largest offshore wind farm in the world. These steps mark progress on two large European offshore wind projects in Ørsted's portfolio. For investors tracking the build out of renewabl

news.title: Ørsted and PGE kick off offshore installation of Baltica 2 project
news.summary: Ørsted and PGE have installed the first foundations of the Baltica 2 project in the Polish part of the Baltic Sea.

news.title: Ørsted and PGE start offshore works on Baltica 2 wind farm
news.summary: Van Oord is carrying out the installation programme, which involves placing 111 monopiles.

news.title: Ørsted’s Q1 2026 net profit falls 46% to $412m
news.summary: The result was influenced by non-cash tax effects and impairments due to elevated long-dated US interest rates.

news.title: Orsted’s Earnings Rise on Jump in Offshore Generation
news.summary: The renewable-energy company’s earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation and amortization rose 8% from a year earlier.

news.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Ørsted (CPSE:ORSTED) After Its Recent Share Price Rebound
news.summary: If you are wondering whether Ørsted’s share price still offers value after a rocky few years, or if the easy gains are already gone, this article breaks down what the current price might be telling you. news.title: This Week In Energy Transition - Perigus Energy Emerges as New Onshore Renewable Powerhouse
news.summary: Copenhagen Infrastructure Partners (CIP) has completed the acquisition of Ørsted's European onshore platform, leading to the launch of Perigus Energy, a new player in the European onshore renewable energy sector. Operating in Ireland, Germany, the United Kingdom, and Spain, Perigus Energy currently manages 826 MW of operational and under-construction capacity, with a pipeline poised for substantia

news.title: CIP completes acquisition of Ørsted’s European onshore platform and launches Perigus Energy
news.summary: Copenhagen Infrastructure Partners has completed the acquisition of Ørsted’s European onshore platform and launches Perigus Energy.

news.title: CIP acquires Ørsted’s onshore business in Europe
news.summary: CIP completed the purchase through its fifth flagship fund, CI V.

news.title: Hitachi Energy becomes Ørsted’s end-to-end partner for offshore wind electrical systems
news.summary: Hitachi Energy and Ørsted have entered a strategic partnership designed to support large scale offshore wind projects.

news.title: How the U.S. and Europe Are Betting Differently on Energy Security
news.summary: Europe is accelerating offshore wind as Hornsea 3 connects its first cable and France tenders 12 GW — while the U.S. pays $1B to cancel projects.

news.title: U.S. Green Light For Ørsted Projects Shifts Focus To Execution And Value
news.summary: U.S. regulators have lifted government stop work orders on Ørsted’s offshore wind projects, including Revolution Wind and Sunrise Wind. Recent legal and policy decisions, including the Trump administration not appealing a court ruling, have removed key regulatory barriers. The new clarity affects Ørsted’s U.S. operations and broader growth plans for CPSE:ORSTED in the American offshore wind market

news.title: BofA upgrades Ørsted outlook, cites diminishing offshore wind risk from Trump
news.summary: Bank of America analyst Peter Bisztyga said the risks facing Ørsted’s U.S. projects "have significantly diminished in the last few weeks."
